case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF VS. TEERUT BOONSOMBUTI et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOONSOMBUTI, TEERUT , EACH INDIVIDUALLY & AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME PLATE, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP PILAIKIAT, PAIRACH , EACH INDIVIDUALLY & AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME PLATE, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $24,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,500.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BOONSOMBUTI, TEERUT , EACH INDIVIDUALLY & AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME PLATE, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP PILAIKIAT, PAIRACH , EACH INDIVIDUALLY & AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME PLATE, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
